iatrochemical.d:
a. Of or pertaining to iatrochemistry, or to the
   iatrochemists.

iatrochemist.d:
n. A physician who explained or treated diseases upon
   chemical principles; one who practiced iatrochemistry.

iatrochemistry.d:
n. Chemistry applied to, or used in, medicine; -- used
   especially with reference to the doctrines in the school of physicians
   in Flanders, in the 17th century, who held that health depends upon the
   proper chemical relations of the fluids of the body, and who endeavored
   to explain the conditions of health or disease by chemical principles.
